CREATE TABLE events (event_id INT, event_time TIMESTAMP);
SELECT e.event_id, e.event_time, microsecond(e.event_time) FROM events e WHERE microsecond(e.event_time) >= 500000;
CREATE TABLE date_ranges (start_date TIMESTAMP, end_date TIMESTAMP);
SELECT microsecond(e.event_time) FROM events e, date_ranges dr WHERE e.event_time BETWEEN dr.start_date AND dr.end_date;
SELECT e.event_id, microsecond(e.event_time) + 100000 AS adjusted_microsecond FROM events e;
SELECT DISTINCT microsecond(event_time) FROM timestamps ORDER BY microsecond(event_time);
